title: Op Snap — West Midlands
description: West Midlands Police Operation Snap driving offence data (Jan 2025 – Feb 2026)

top-offence-locations.title: Top offence locations
top-offence-locations.description: Streets with the most reported offences, with map
top-offence-locations.sql: select offence_location, council_area, count(*) as total_reports, sum(case when disposal in ('Fixed Penalty', 'Court') then 1 else 0 end) as fines_or_court, sum(case when disposal = 'Education' then 1 else 0 end) as education, sum(case when disposal = 'Warning Letter' then 1 else 0 end) as warning_letters, sum(case when disposal = 'NFA' then 1 else 0 end) as nfa, round(100.0 * sum(case when disposal != 'NFA' then 1 else 0 end) / count(*), 1) as action_rate_pct from reports where offence_location is not null group by offence_location, council_area order by total_reports desc limit 50

disposal-breakdown-by-month.title: Disposal breakdown by month
disposal-breakdown-by-month.description: How outcomes have changed over time
disposal-breakdown-by-month.sql: select month, count(*) as total, sum(case when disposal = 'Education' then 1 else 0 end) as education, sum(case when disposal = 'Warning Letter' then 1 else 0 end) as warning_letter, sum(case when disposal = 'Fixed Penalty' then 1 else 0 end) as fixed_penalty, sum(case when disposal = 'Court' then 1 else 0 end) as court, sum(case when disposal = 'NFA' then 1 else 0 end) as nfa, round(100.0 * sum(case when disposal not in ('NFA', 'Duplicate Submission') then 1 else 0 end) / count(*), 1) as action_rate_pct from reports group by month order by month

vehicle-makes.title: Top vehicle makes
vehicle-makes.description: Which vehicle makes appear most in offence reports
vehicle-makes.sql: select vehicle_make, count(*) as total_reports, sum(case when disposal = 'Fixed Penalty' then 1 else 0 end) as fines, sum(case when disposal = 'Court' then 1 else 0 end) as court, sum(case when disposal = 'NFA' then 1 else 0 end) as nfa, round(100.0 * sum(case when disposal not in ('NFA', 'Duplicate Submission') then 1 else 0 end) / count(*), 1) as action_rate_pct from reports where vehicle_make is not null group by vehicle_make order by total_reports desc limit 30

pavement-parking-hotspots.title: Pavement parking hotspots
pavement-parking-hotspots.description: Locations with the most pavement parking / obstruction offences, with map
pavement-parking-hotspots.sql: select r.offence_location, r.council_area, count(*) as total_reports, r.latitude, r.longitude from reports r where (r.offence like '%obstruction%' or r.offence like '%dangerous position%') and r.offence_location is not null group by r.offence_location, r.council_area order by total_reports desc limit 100

offence-types.title: Offence type breakdown
offence-types.description: All offence types ranked by frequency
offence-types.sql: select offence, count(*) as total_reports, sum(case when disposal = 'NFA' then 1 else 0 end) as nfa, round(100.0 * sum(case when disposal not in ('NFA', 'Duplicate Submission') then 1 else 0 end) / count(*), 1) as action_rate_pct from reports where offence is not null group by offence order by total_reports desc

reporter-vs-offence.title: Reporter type vs offence
reporter-vs-offence.description: What pedestrians, cyclists, and drivers report differently
reporter-vs-offence.sql: select reporter_transport_mode, offence, count(*) as total from reports where reporter_transport_mode is not null group by reporter_transport_mode, offence order by reporter_transport_mode, total desc

council-area-comparison.title: Council area comparison
council-area-comparison.description: Submissions and outcomes by council area
council-area-comparison.sql: select council_area, count(*) as total_reports, sum(case when disposal = 'Education' then 1 else 0 end) as education, sum(case when disposal = 'Warning Letter' then 1 else 0 end) as warning_letter, sum(case when disposal = 'Fixed Penalty' then 1 else 0 end) as fixed_penalty, sum(case when disposal = 'Court' then 1 else 0 end) as court, sum(case when disposal = 'NFA' then 1 else 0 end) as nfa, round(100.0 * sum(case when disposal not in ('NFA', 'Duplicate Submission') then 1 else 0 end) / count(*), 1) as action_rate_pct from reports where council_area is not null and council_area != 'Out of Force Area' group by council_area order by total_reports desc

all-offences-map.title: All offences (map)
all-offences-map.description: Every geocoded offence on a clustered map
all-offences-map.sql: select offence_location, council_area, offence, disposal, vehicle_make, vehicle_model, vehicle_colour, reporter_transport_mode, month, latitude, longitude from reports where latitude is not null limit 5000
